Near-star PSF lens flare (aperture diffraction) + per-pixel analytic depth occlusion + galaxy disc crossfade; closed via 5-iteration play-test loop

remaining_tasks.name: Finalize rendering overhaul: lock D-05 HDR/linear-before-dither composition ordering; remove dead WorldRenderer._lastRenderPositions cache + its per-frame writes (keep GetRenderPosition/GetRenderRadius working); confirm no stale galaxy uniforms remain in LuminousPassRenderer; final per-tier parity/improvement play-test across all four spaces (CRT stays OUT, D-06)

human_actions_pending.action: Final play-test gate at end of 05-04 (per-tier parity across Planet/Star/Galaxy/Universe spaces)
human_actions_pending.context: 05-04 Task 3 is a checkpoint:human-verify; execution pauses for in-Godot verification

decisions.decision: Metres->render conversion in this engine MUST be `metres / ship.LocalPos.Scale * StarRenderFactor` (observer-unit basis), never `metres * factor`
decisions.rationale: The 05-03 PSF depth-occlusion bug took 5 iterations; root cause was omitting the `/ ship.LocalPos.Scale` divisor, making star render-depth 1e4x too small in Planet space (scale=1e-4). Identical conversion is used at all 4 WorldRenderer call sites + descriptor RenderDistance.

decisions.decision: StarRenderFactor (1e-8) is a single source of truth: defined once in LuminousDescriptorBuilder, aliased by WorldRenderer.StarRenderFactor
decisions.rationale: Prevents the duplicate-literal drift that contributed to the units bug

decisions.decision: Render-space distance pre-computed in the builder and stored on LuminousBodyDescriptor.RenderDistance; consumed read-only by LuminousPassRenderer
decisions.rationale: LuminousPassRenderer is a Camera3D child with no WorldPath; resolving the world itself returned null and zeroed star_count (no PSF). The builder reliably has the ship. D-02 single-descriptor principle.

decisions.decision: Near-star glow is a screen-space aperture-diffraction PSF (inverse-cube core + H/V spikes), depth-gated per-pixel; galaxies are sky-shader-only (D-13)
decisions.rationale: User play-test direction (ShaderToy reference); reversed D-09 so the skybox stays the distant-body drawer (D-07)

decisions.decision: Play-test-approved knobs (D-04, 2026-06-19): PsfCoreScale=80, PsfSpikeLongScale=12, PsfSpikeShortScale=0.25, PsfIntensity=1.0, PsfLodFloor=0.02, PsfLodRange=0.6, PsfDepthEpsilon=50 (render units); MinVisibleBrightness=0.05; NearStarEmissionFloor=0.8; star/galaxy uniform caps 128/32
decisions.rationale: Calibrated live in the editor during the 05-02/05-03 play-tests
